---
title: "Hyperverse ecosystem"
toc: false
---

```{r}
#| include: false
source(here::here("R/packages.R"))
```

## Hyperverse packages

Core R packages built and maintained under the `hyperverse-r` organization.
They share the same design conventions, compose cleanly together, and are
aimed at CRAN.

```{r}
#| echo: false
packages_grid()
```

## Compatible packages

Third-party R packages that aren't part of the `hyperverse-r` organization but
play well with the stack. Listed here so you can find them when you need them.

```{r}
#| echo: false
partners_grid()
```
